blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
